headline: Is Borr Drilling (BORR) One of the Best Oil and Gas Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade?
summary: Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE:BORR) is one of the best oil and gas stocks to buy for the next decade. Capital One initiated coverage of Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE:BORR) with an Overweight rating on July 1 and set a price target of $6 on the stock. headline: PNC Financial: Premium Valuation Leads To 'Hold' Recommendation Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
summary: PNC Financial is a Hold, citing solid earnings and NIM growth post-FirstBank, but premium valuation and a 2.7% yield cap upside. Click for more on PNC stock.

headline: Brookdale Announces Successful Financing Transactions; Extends 2027 Non-Recourse Mortgage Debt Maturity and Extends and Expands Credit Facility
summary: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) ("Brookdale" or "the Company") announced today that the Company recently completed two financing transactions, proactively addressing another portion of its 2027 debt maturities while also expanding and extending its revolving credit agreement.
